title: hook.Run once with all players vs per-player hook.Run
prompt:
In Garry's Mod Lua, you need to notify custom logic for every player each tick. A naive version loops over the players and calls hook.Run once per player. Show a faster pattern that avoids that per-player hook overhead.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.
